queryList.query: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.hasspn = true AND u.enabled = true AND NOT u.name STARTS WITH 'KRBTGT' RETURN u

queries.name: [J0stif] Kerberoastable users with path to DA

queryList.query: MATCH (u:User {hasspn:true, enabled:true}) RETURN u.name, u.domain ORDER BY u.name
MATCH (a)-[:GenericWrite]->(b:User) WHERE a.enabled = true RETURN a, b
MATCH (a)-[:GenericWrite]->(c:Computer) WHERE a.enabled = true RETURN a, c

queries.name: [J0stif] All write edges to high-value targets

queryList.query: MATCH (a)-[r:GenericWrite|GenericAll|WriteDacl|WriteOwner|Owns]->(b) WHERE b.highvalue = true AND a.enabled = true RETURN a, r, b
MATCH (a)-[r:DCSync|GetChanges|GetChangesAll]->(d:Domain) WHERE a.enabled = true RETURN a, r, d
MATCH (u)-[:MemberOf*1..]->(g:Group) WHERE g.name CONTAINS 'ALLOWED RODC PASSWORD' RETURN u, g

queries.name: [J0stif] High-value users NOT in Denied RODC PRP (KeyList targets)

queryList.query: MATCH (u:User {enabled:true}) WHERE u.highvalue = true AND NOT (u)-[:MemberOf*1..]->(:Group) WHERE toString(toLower(g.name)) CONTAINS 'denied rodc' RETURN u

queries.name: [J0stif] Shortest path from owned to DA

queryList.query: MATCH (owned {owned:true}), (da:Group) WHERE da.name STARTS WITH 'DOMAIN ADMINS' MATCH p = shortestPath((owned)-[*1..10]->(da)) WHERE owned <> da RETURN p
MATCH (da:User)-[:MemberOf*1..]->(g:Group) WHERE g.name STARTS WITH 'DOMAIN ADMINS' MATCH (da)-[:HasSession]->(c:Computer) RETURN da, c

queries.name: [J0stif] Users with SID history to high-value groups

queryList.query: MATCH (u:User)-[:HasSIDHistory]->(g:Group) WHERE g.highvalue = true RETURN u, g
